title: Oportun Financial (OPRT) Q3 2024 Earnings
text: Oportun Financial Corporation reported the following Q3 2024 results for the quarter ended September 2024: Revenue: $250 million, representing a year-over-year decline of 6.8%. EPS: $0.02, compared to -$0.46 in the prior year period. This was a Zacks Equity Research report analyzing how Oportun's actual performance compared to Wall Street expectations. The company demonstrated profitability improvement from the prior-year quarter when it had posted a loss per share.
